mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.daily_session_id, e.member_user_id, e.buy_in_total, e.cash_out_total, e.profit, e.note, e.settlement_status, e.settled_amount, e.settlement_note, e.settled_by, e.settled_at, e.created_by, e.updated_by, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM entries e WHERE e.id = #{id}

SELECT e.id, e.daily_session_id, e.member_user_id, m.display_name AS member_name, e.buy_in_total, e.cash_out_total, e.profit, e.note, e.settlement_status, e.settled_amount, e.settlement_note, e.settled_at, u2.display_name AS settled_by_name, e.updated_at, u1.display_name AS updated_by_name FROM entries e INNER JOIN users m ON m.id = e.member_user_id LEFT JOIN users u1 ON u1.id = e.updated_by LEFT JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = e.settled_by WHERE e.daily_session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY m.display_name ASC

SELECT e.id, e.daily_session_id, e.member_user_id, m.display_name AS member_name, e.buy_in_total, e.cash_out_total, e.profit, e.note, e.settlement_status, e.settled_amount, e.settlement_note, e.settled_at, u2.display_name AS settled_by_name, e.updated_at, u1.display_name AS updated_by_name FROM entries e INNER JOIN users m ON m.id = e.member_user_id LEFT JOIN users u1 ON u1.id = e.updated_by LEFT JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = e.settled_by WHERE e.daily_session_id = #{sessionId} AND e.settlement_status != 'PAID' ORDER BY e.settlement_status ASC, m.display_name ASC

SELECT e.id, e.daily_session_id, e.member_user_id, e.buy_in_total, e.cash_out_total, e.profit, e.note, e.settlement_status, e.settled_amount, e.settlement_note, e.settled_by, e.settled_at, e.created_by, e.updated_by, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM entries e WHERE e.daily_session_id = #{sessionId} AND e.member_user_id = #{memberUserId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO entries (daily_session_id, member_user_id, buy_in_total, cash_out_total, note, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{dailySessionId}, #{memberUserId}, #{buyInTotal}, #{cashOutTotal}, #{note}, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE entries SET buy_in_total = #{buyInTotal}, cash_out_total = #{cashOutTotal}, note = #{note}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE entries SET settlement_status = #{settlementStatus}, settled_amount = #{settledAmount}, settlement_note = #{settlementNote}, settled_by = #{settledBy}, settled_at = #{settledAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
